summary: Mud management tips for horse properties: installing drainage, removing manure, and rotating pastures to protect hoof health.

Overview of equine assisted learning, an emerging unmounted practice using horses to help people learn and gain self-awareness.
Common signs of a sore back in horses, including reluctance to move forward, travel in a frame, or pick up a certain canter lead.
